name: Dog's Life [DL]
description:
...a stray dog with human-level understanding, navigating the complex social landscape of the urban canine world?

Thats you now.

The city is divided into territories controlled by different dog factions, with humans as the unpredictable overlords who control resources.

Updated over time via your feedback.

This is my first of many creative bots. I thought this site needs some more creative stuff. Honestly I feel like everything is getting the same, so here is something completely different and unusual. No fancy text, no bling bling, just a bot that gets regular update and the start of maybe a series.

-Shinkaaaa

Extra tips:

Use proxy for best results

MAKE A DOG PERSONA and set your type of breed
